    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures

      abstract AffineTransformation2D AffineTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an affine 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point or line correspondences found using the robust estimator.

      Estimates a dual quadric using a robust estimator and the best set of 3D planes that fit into the locus of the estimated dual quadric found using the robust estimator.
      PinholeCamera RANSACEPnPPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a pinhole camera using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D/3D point correspondences or 2D line/3D plane correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      EuclideanTransformation2D RANSACEuclideanTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an euclidean 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      EuclideanTransformation3D RANSACEuclideanTransformation3DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an affine 3D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 3D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      Line2D RANSACLine2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a 2D line using a robust estimator and the best set of 2D points that pass through the estimated 2D line (i.e.
      AffineTransformation2D RANSACLineCorrespondenceAffineTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an affine 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D lines correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      ProjectiveTransformation2D RANSACLineCorrespondenceProjectiveTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a projective 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D lines correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      MetricTransformation2D RANSACMetricTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      MetricTransformation3D RANSACMetricTransformation3DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 3D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 3D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      AffineTransformation3D RANSACPlaneCorrespondenceAffineTransformation3DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an affine 3D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 3D lines correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      ProjectiveTransformation3D RANSACPlaneCorrespondenceProjectiveTransformation3DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a projective 3D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 3D planes correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      Plane RANSACPlaneRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a 3D plane using a robust estimator and the best set of 3D points that pass through the estimated 3D plane (i.e.
      Point2D RANSACPoint2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a 2D point using a robust estimator and the best set of 2D lines that intersect into the estimated 2D point.
      Point3D RANSACPoint3DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a 3D point using a robust estimator and the best set of 3D planes that intersect into the estimated 3D point.
      AffineTransformation2D RANSACPointCorrespondenceAffineTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an affine 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      AffineTransformation3D RANSACPointCorrespondenceAffineTransformation3DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an affine 3D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 3D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      ProjectiveTransformation2D RANSACPointCorrespondenceProjectiveTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates an projective 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator
      ProjectiveTransformation3D RANSACPointCorrespondenceProjectiveTransformation3DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a projective 3D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 3D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      Quadric RANSACQuadricRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a quadric using a robust estimator and the best set of 3D points that fit into the locus of the estimated quadric found using the robust estimator.
      Sphere RANSACSphereRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a sphere using a robust estimator and the best set of 3D points that fit into the locus of the estimated sphere found using the robust estimator.
      PinholeCamera RANSACUPnPPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a pinhole camera using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D/3D point correspondences or 2D line/3D plane correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      abstract Sphere SphereRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a sphere using a robust estimator and the best set of 3D points that fit into the locus of the estimated sphere found using the robust estimator.
      PinholeCamera UPnPPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a pinhole camera.
      PinholeCamera WeightedLinePlaneCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a pinhole camera.
      private void EPnPPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.generalSolution1()
      Tests solution 1 for general point configuration.
      private void EPnPPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.generalSolution2()
      Tests solution 2 for general point configuration.
      private void EPnPPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.generalSolution3()
      Tests solution 3 for general point configuration.

      void AffineTransformation2DRobustEstimator.setConfidence​(double confidence)
      Sets amount of confidence expressed as a value between 0.0 and 1.0 (which is equivalent to 100%).
      void AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimator.setConfidence​(double confidence)
      Sets amount of confidence expressed as a value between 0.0 and 1.0 (which is equivalent to 100%).

      void UPnPPointCorrespondencePinholeCameraEstimator.setHorizontalPrincipalPoint​(double horizontalPrincipalPoint)
      Sets horizontal coordinate of principal point on intrinsic parameters to be used on estimated camera.

      Sets horizontal coordinate of principal point on intrinsic parameters to be used on estimated camera.

      Sets intrinsic parameters of camera to be estimated.
      void DualConicRobustEstimator.setLines​(java.util.List<Line2D> lines)
      Sets list of lines to be used to estimate a dual conic.
      void LineCorrespondenceAffineTransformation2DRobustEstimator.setLines​(java.util.List<Line2D> inputLines, java.util.List<Line2D> outputLines)

      void LineCorrespondenceProjectiveTransformation2DRobustEstimator.setLines​(java.util.List<Line2D> inputLines, java.util.List<Line2D> outputLines)

      void Point2DRobustEstimator.setLines​(java.util.List<Line2D> lines)
      Sets list of lines to be used to estimate a 2D point.
      void LinePlaneCorrespondencePinholeCameraRobustEstimator.setLinesAndPlanes​(java.util.List<Plane> planes, java.util.List<Line2D> lines)
      Sets list of matched 3D planes and 2D lines to be used to estimate a pinhole camera.
      void AffineTransformation2DRobustEstimator.setListener​(AffineTransformation2DRobustEstimatorListener listener)
